title: englerina swynnertonii
intro: Englerina swynnertonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae, commonly known as a mistletoe. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, with traditional uses including the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Englerina swynnertonii are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Englerina swynnertonii include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water.
